title: Posting Screenshots from clipboard in Forms
excerpt: Is it possible to set up a posting of screenshots from the clipboard in Forms? At the moment only drag/drop works.

posts.author: dominik.hagenbucher (Dominik Hagenbucher)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to set up a posting of screenshots from the clipboard in Forms? At the moment only drag/drop works.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Dominik!

From my understanding you should be able to upload these screenshots into your form! Can you let me know what’s occurring when you try to upload without dragging and dropping?
